---
title: "Report Peak Finding Merck V2"
subtitle: "C++ Implementation and Integration in StreamFind"
author: "Ricardo Cunha"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
toc: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 300px
      body-width: 1200px
      margin-width: 300px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    other-links:
      - text: StreamFind
        href: https://odea-project.github.io/StreamFind/
        icon: github
    html-math-method: katex
    theme: journal
    code-tools: true
    anchor-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: scroll
    code-line-numbers: false
    code-copy: true
    cap-location: top
    self-contained: true
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
execute:
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false

options(DT.options = list(
  dom = "lfrtip",
  autoWidth = TRUE,
  pageLength = 10,
  lengthMenu = c(10, 20, 50, 75, 100),
  initComplete = htmlwidgets::JS(
    "function(settings, json) {",
    "$(this.api().table().body()).css({'font-size': '12px'});",
    "$(this.api().table().body()).css({'white-space': 'nowrap'});",
    "}"
  )
))

simple_table_opt <- list(
  dom = 't',
  paging = FALSE,
  searching = FALSE,
  info = FALSE
)

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(data.table)
library(DT)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(StreamFind)

devtools::load_all()

source(file.path("C:\\Users\\apoli\\Documents\\github\\StreamFind\\dev\\merck_peak_finding\\dev_resources.R"))

examples <- unique(files_merck_ex$example)
```

```{r}
#| label: run-peak-finding-debug-merck-single
#| include: false

example_name <- examples[1]
db_merck_ex1 <- db_merck_ex[db_merck_ex$example %in% example_name, ]
files <- files_merck_ex$file_path[files_merck_ex$example %in% example_name]

ps_ff <- DB_MassSpecMethod_FindFeatures_native(
  rtWindows = data.frame(rtmin = 300, rtmax = 3400),
  ppmThreshold = 15,
  noiseThreshold = 15,
  minSNR = 3,
  minTraces = 3,
  baselineWindow = 200,
  maxWidth = 250,
  base_quantile = 0.99,
  debug_mz = 0
)

# ps_bsub <- DB_MassSpecMethod_FeatureBlankSubtraction(
#   blankThreshold = 5,
#   rtExpand = 10,
#   mzExpand = 0.005
# )

project_path <- file.path(getwd(), "dev", "merck_peak_finding", "data")
# file.remove(list.files(project_path, full.names = TRUE))
# fs::dir_delete(project_path)
ms <- DB_MassSpecEngine$new(project_path, files = files)

ms$Workflow = list(ps_ff)
ms$run_workflow()
```

```{r}

plot_features(
  ms$NonTargetAnalysis,
  analyses = 1,
  mz = db_merck_ex[db_merck_ex$example %in% examples[1], ],
  ppm = 20,
  sec = 60
)
```

# App

```{r}
#| label: run_app

project_path <- file.path(getwd(), "dev", "merck_peak_finding", "data")
ms <- DB_MassSpecEngine$new(project_path)
ms$run_app()
```
